C1.descriptionTemplate: Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Murphy: Fauxborn inflicts [Arg2]% of the DMG she deals as {Sacrifice} stacks on the target. At turn start, gain 1 stack of {Life Seal}.

C2.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus

C3.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

C4.descriptionTemplate:
Gain Keyflare equal to [Arg6]% Keyflare Regen. Trigger different effects based on current Tentacle Stance:
{Surging Tides}: {Tentacle DMG} +[TentaclePower:Arg8], generate 1 Tentacle.
{Tranquil Sea}: Gain [Block:Arg9] Shield, {Retain} 50% Shield to next turn.
{Raging Waves}: Deal [Damage:Arg4] DMG [Arg3] times to the enemy with Highest HP, which enjoys a [Arg5]% {Tentacle DMG} bonus.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Gain 2 Arithmetica and draw 2 cards. Suffer {Sacrifice} equal to [Arg1]% Max HP at the start of next turn. {Aftershock}: Remove {Sacrifice} stacks equal to [Float:Arg2]% Max HP.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate:
Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Suffer {Sacrifice} equal to [Arg2]% Max HP at the start of next turn.
Inflict [Arg3] stacks of {Birth Ritual} on all enemies. Deal [Damage:Arg5] DMG [Arg4] times to the enemy with Highest HP, which enjoys an [Arg6]% {Tentacle DMG} bonus.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Inflict +5 stacks of {Birth Ritual}. Generate 3 {Waltz of Lemuria} with 2 Arithmetica Cost, with {Prepare} and {Exhaust}.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
When Murphy: Fauxborn is in the team, the {Aequor} Realm ascends to Divine Realm: {Aequor}.
{Tentacle DMG} is changed to 5% of the team's Max HP.
Team DMG Amplification +50% after exploration begins (Effect doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners, though no additional starting Tentacles will be obtained).
Tentacle Gathering effect is removed.
{Divine Realm: Tentacle Stance} features the following new effects:
{Divine Realm: Tranquil Sea}: Immediately generate Shield equal to 25% Max HP, and Tentacles will no longer attack at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
{Divine Realm: Raging Waves}: {Tentacle DMG} × 125% for the turn; after dealing Active DMG, 1 Tentacle attacks; lose 1 Tentacle at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
Realm Mastery is counted as Divine Realm: {Aequor} Mastery:
Each point provides: {Tranquil Sea} Stance's Shield Generation +0.025% Max HP. {Raging Waves} Stance's {Tentacle DMG} +0.025%. Effect doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Whenever Murphy: Fauxborn deals DMG, inflict {Sacrifice} stacks equal to [Arg3]% of DMG dealt on the target. {Life Seal} state's {Birth Ritual} stack increase effect is doubled.
When there are 1/2/3 other {Lemurian} Awakeners in the team: Max HP +6%/15%/30%; gain Shield equal to 50%/125%/250% of Murphy: Fauxborn's DEF after any {Lemurian} Awakener uses Exalt. Limited to once per turn; does not benefit from Shield Generation Boost.

E1.descriptionTemplate: {Waltz of Lemuria} {Tentacle DMG}, Shield Generation, and Final DMG +10%, with an additional 0.2% increase for each point of Keyflare Regen Level.

E2.descriptionTemplate: Murphy: Fauxborn's Crit. Rate +3% per Tentacle. Murphy: Fauxborn's Crit. DMG +3% per 1% Max HP value of {Sacrifice} or {Delayed Sacrifice} stacks.

E3.descriptionTemplate: Draw 1 {Abyss Hymns} when {Strike} or {Defense} is used. Takes effect once per turn.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Draw 1 {Abyss Hymns}, takes effect once per turn.
Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Draw 1 {Abyss Hymns}, takes effect once per turn.
